feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: >population of 60 million >historically the most influential people of all time …
entry.content: >population of 60 million >historically the most influential people of all time >haven’t heard anything about them in years What the fuck are they doing over there

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Should Smash Ultimate have smogon style tiering
entry.content: The advantage to smogon style tiering is that it allows for each character to have a niece in at least 1 tier, king dedede sucks in ultimate but in a tournament where you can only use "PU" characters he will have a prominent part to play in the meta game even if he's still not top tier this system will allow for a more accurate tier system because you can move characters up or down based on how they do against fellow characters of the same tier each tier will allow you to use characters in lower

Stop winning about your board being ruined when you do nothing about it. It's literally this easy. Kill all porn threads and don't stop until the whole catalogue is us. Original posts from original posters, like how it was 10- years ago. Pass the message on and don't let the idea die

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: FFXIV vs WoW
entry.content: Let's settle this once for all. Which is the better MMO? I will tell you my personal opinion without any bias. I used to be a WoW nerd when i was in my early teens in 2009-2015 but now that i'm pushing 30 i prefer XIV because it's a lot more chill. I don't have the time to do Mythic+ or raiding, so FFXIV appeals more to me. How about (you)? Which one do you prefer and why?

entry.title: /int/ International: Does your country have a song that was covered in many different languages?
entry.content: 1997 song Şımarık (known as kiss kiss in abroad) by Tarkan was a massive hit and was covered in many different languages. Kiss sounds in the chorus is still very iconic today https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cpp 69ghR1IM&list=RDcpp69ghR1IM&start_r adio=1 What's your country's equilavent?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: broke loser wants c5
entry.content: I’m about to get $4.5k in taxes and want to use it for a down payment on a cool car If I make $1400 every other month and pay 150 monthly for car insurance and have a credit score of 680 can I afford a used corvette c5 or should I wait until I have more money and buy a c6? Are there any other good not so expensive cool cars I could get instead?

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Jose Alfredo Jimenez
entry.content: If you’re a country music fan, discovering this guy is like finding a new Hank, Willy or Waylon. He’s every bit as good as they are, maybe better. I don’t speak a lick of Spanish but if I put on “El Ray” or “Ella” and get to drinking, I understand every word. You will too. https://youtu.be/ZipzeNiBe_E

THIS IS NOT FAIR. I'M NOT EVEN A WHITE PERSON. I DON'T DESERVE IT. NOBODY DESERVES BEING BORN IN A THIRD WORLD COUNTRY AS A BROWN AND NIGGER PERSON.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: kilobits vs kilobytes
entry.content: Just pick one. And stop saying "k" by itself. Or is it "K"? Also k, K, kb, kB, Kb, KB, kib, kiB, Kib, KiB, kIb, KIb, KLB

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Do you like Stomp Clap Hey? >they're ok, I guess Their early work was a little t…
entry.content: Do you like Stomp Clap Hey? >they're ok, I guess Their early work was a little too underground for my taste. But when Ho Hey came out in '12, I think they really came into their own, commercially and artistically. The whole genre has an energetic, folksy sound, and a new mashup of commercialized authenticity that really gives the songs a big boost. It's been compared to Antifolk, but I think Stomp Clap has a far less bitter, more post-ironic sense of wonder.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >"I remember one time - it might have been a couple times - at the Fillmore East…
entry.content: >"I remember one time - it might have been a couple times - at the Fillmore East in 1970, I was opening for this sorry-ass cat named Steve Miller. Steve Miller didn't have his shit going for him, so I'm pissed because I got to open for this non-playing motherfucker just because he had one or two sorry-ass records out. So I would come late and he would have to go on first and then we got there we smoked the motherfucking place, everybody dug it."

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8391 Happy Family Edition Previous Thread: >>83575839 F-…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8391 Happy Family Edition Previous Thread: >>83575839 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profi

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: I am not crazy! I know he swapped those numbers! I knew it was 1216. One after M…
entry.content: I am not crazy! I know he swapped those numbers! I knew it was 1216. One after Magna Carta. As if I could ever make such a mistake. Never. Never! I just – I just couldn't prove it. He – he covered his tracks, he got that idiot at the copy shop to lie for him. You think this is something? You think this is bad? This? This chicanery? He's done worse. That billboard! Are you telling me that a man just happens to fall like that? No! He orchestrated it! Jimmy! He defecated through a sunroof! And I sa

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: The NextGen Acela is America's newest and fastest high-speed train. It runs alon…
entry.content: The NextGen Acela is America's newest and fastest high-speed train. It runs along the Northeast Corridor between Washington D.C. and Boston, and is capable of reaching top speeds of 160 mph (257.5 km/h). For a frame of reference, the standard top operating speed on the Tokaido Shinkansen line (connecting Tokyo and Shin-Osaka) used by N700 series trains in Japan is 177 mph (285 km/h). I can't wait to ride it myself one day!

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Do you think cloud-gaming is the future? You no longer have to keep up with the …
entry.content: Do you think cloud-gaming is the future? You no longer have to keep up with the latest hardware (so it could potentially be a lot cheaper in the long run), and you can run everything at max settings from any old device you have (since you're only streaming the game instead of emulating it on your device).

entry.title: /int/ International: There was a merchant in Baghdad who sent his servant to market to buy provisions
entry.content: and in a little while the servant came back, white and trembling, and said, Master, just now when I was in the marketplace I was jostled by a woman in the crowd and when I turned I saw it was Death that had jostled me. She looked at me and made a threatening gesture; now, lend me your horse, and I will ride away from this city and avoid my fate. I will go to Samarra and there Death will not find me. The merchant lent him his horse, and the servant mounted it, and he dug his spurs in its flanks a

entry.title: /b/ Random: Retard Steve, as he was known to the locals, lived a life that was not defined b…
entry.content: Retard Steve, as he was known to the locals, lived a life that was not defined by his challenges, but by his unwavering resilience. He was a gay man with AIDS, and his mental capacity was not like that of others. Despite these obstacles, Steve found joy in the simplest of things - a warm sun on his face, the sound of birds chirping, or the taste of his favorite ice cream. Steve lived in a small group home on the outskirts of town, where he was cared for by a team of dedicated caregivers. They he

entry.title: /int/ International: One thing I will never get about Indians is the way they prepare their dishes. W…
entry.content: One thing I will never get about Indians is the way they prepare their dishes. Whats the point of adding 20 different spices to every dish if you're just gonna dump an ungodly amount of chili into it so you cannot taste anything but the chili?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: browser seems to keep only a relatively small amount of history
entry.content: The topic is pretty niche, so please at least bump the thread so it doesn’t sink too quickly. It’s niche, but it’s something that would be useful to every one of us. Right now, my browser seems to keep only a relatively small amount of history and may even delete it after some time. The only thing I want from life is a browser that won’t delete my browsing history and that will work on both phone and PC. Right now I use Waterfox and IceRaven. It also has to support fucking uBlock. Do you have an

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >Watching a YouTube video about nature vs agriculture and shit >around ten minut…
entry.content: >Watching a YouTube video about nature vs agriculture and shit >around ten minutes in I realize the narrator just keeps introducing issues without settling a few of it in the video >Look at comments >All praises >Footage are stock videos or stolen clips >Look closely at title >It has an AI notice at the end of the title >YouTube put an AI notice on the video's title because the narration sound so human I just wasted ten minutes of my time on AI slop. I have AI fatigue.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I'm still fucking mad. It's been 13 fucking years, and I'm still mad. I'm so mad…
entry.content: I'm still fucking mad. It's been 13 fucking years, and I'm still mad. I'm so mad, I wish they never made Thieves in Time at all. The worst part about that fucking game is that Sanzaru got the core gameplay and level design completely right, so you keep being pulled through the shitty ancestor gimmicks, minigames and truly dogshit story that couldn't be any worse if it were deliberate ragebait. If I must make an obligatory food analogy, I'd say it's like having a really nice chicken salad sandwic
